title: Carpet to Wool
description: Simple mod that adds recipes to craft carpets back into wool
body:
### With this mod, you can craft carpets back into wool!
_Perfect addition to carpet farms!_

- Works with wool:

![Crafting recipe - Wool](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f68599c93cd27f53395c0a04577bbcb064cad273.png)

- Colored wool:

![Crafting recipe - Colored wool (example)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21ee94fd45a90574e5f87203f0ae69c44a6675a9.png)

- And even moss:

![Crafting recipe - Moss](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23ad267da95734b3ccfc471a875f1e8b84dd0c57.png)
